password.requirements: At least 8 characters with letters and numbers
password.tooShort: Password must be at least {{length}} characters
password.tooWeak: Password is too weak. Use a longer or more random combination (avoid common words, keyboard patterns, repeated characters).

account.title: Account
account.multiDeviceWarning: You have "Multi-Device Login" privilege, but email is not set. Please set your email to enable login on other devices!
account.delegateDesc: Set who pays for your subscription
account.deleteAccountWarning: Your account data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
account.deleteAccountFailed: Failed to delete account, please try again

betaProgram.title: Beta Program
betaProgram.description: Get early access to new features and help improve the product
betaProgram.descriptionIos: Get early access to new features and help improve the product. When enabled, you'll receive email invitations to join TestFlight testing when new beta versions are available.
betaProgram.enableWarning: Beta versions may be unstable and could affect normal usage. You can switch back to stable at any time.
betaProgram.disableWarning: The current stable version will be downloaded and installed immediately. The app will restart after installation.

devices.title: My Devices
devices.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete device "{deviceName}"?

proHistory.title: Authorization History
proHistory.fetchFailedNetwork: Failed to fetch history, please check network connection

delegate.emptyDescription: Set someone you can ask to pay for you with one tap at checkout.
delegate.emptyHint: Saving won't notify them yet — the first email they receive is the actual payment request when you check out.
delegate.saveFailed: Failed to save, please try again
delegate.removeConfirm: Remove this delegate? Your future payments will no longer have a preset delegate.
delegate.removeFailed: Failed to remove, please try again
delegate.currentHint: At checkout you can choose "Ask {{email}} to pay" and we'll email them.
